element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core mechanic; difficulty noted as high and unforgiving from early encounters
Foundation for all skill usage and combat progression

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Early Game (recruiting citizens and wasteland creatures)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Party grows from 4 to up to 7 members; NPC autonomy introduces unpredictability
Characters may refuse orders to drop items or perform actions; adds tension management
Player discovers consequences persist; visited areas retain modified state
Access to post-apocalyptic enclaves including Las Vegas; non-linear progression
Investigation reveals AI threat (Base Cochise), killer machines, cybernetic enemies
Evidence of Project Darwin; escalating threat complexity
Pre-war android assists in acquiring technology and weapons for final confrontation
Final objective: infiltrate Base Cochise and trigger meltdown to destroy AI

typical_relief_triggers: Successful recruitment of new party members
Discovery of safe enclaves and human civilization remnants
Leveling up and promotion of characters
Discovering clues in paragraph book entries
typical_tension_triggers: Graphic combat results ('reduced to thin red paste', 'explodes like blood sausage')
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating threat discovery pattern; early exploration and recruitment gradually transitions to investigation of larger menace, culminating in confrontation with existential threat at base fortress

difficulty_curve.early_game: High and unforgiving; immediate combat difficulty with early encounters testing party composition and tactical skill
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating complexity through discovery of conspiracy and encountering increasingly dangerous modified enemies
difficulty_curve.late_game: Climactic difficulty spike at Base Cochise; confrontation with AI and final nuclear reactor sabotage objective
notable_spikes: Initial combat encounters (noted as particularly unforgiving)
Mid-game conspiracy revelation and killer machine encounters

notable_level_patterns.description: Rangers visit surviving human civilization pockets (e.g., post-apocalyptic Las Vegas); combines exploration, NPC interaction, and environmental storytelling through paragraph book entries
Initial small disturbances and investigations gradually reveal larger systematic menace (Base Cochise AI, Project Darwin); each location visited provides clues building toward final revelation
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Progression from local disturbances to base discovery

notable_level_patterns.description: Areas explored and modified retain their state when revisited; player choices have lasting environmental impact, encouraging strategic decision-making
Final level archetype; infiltrating military facility to sabotage nuclear reactor; combines combat, puzzle-solving (obtaining technology), and climactic confrontation
